title: Blackstonia intermedia

It is a member of the genus Blackstonia, which consists of several species of annual or biennial plants. intro: Blackstonia intermedia, also known as Blackstonia, is a flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.
